status_detail_json.source_path: /Users/smy/Downloads/zlibrary/Build a Multi-Agent System (from Scratch) With MCP and A2A (Val Andrei Fajardo) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).epub

translation_samples.target_text: 1_什么是LLM智能体与多智能体系统？
从零开始构建多智能体系统

translation_samples.source_text: We’ll package all our code, which includes the required infrastructure, such as interfaces for tools and LLMs, in the book’s very own LLM agent framework that you’ll get to develop for yourself.
translation_samples.target_text: 我们将把所有代码（包括所需的基础设施，例如工具和LLM的接口）打包到本书专属的LLM智能体框架中，您将亲自开发这个框架。

translation_samples.source_text: Please be sure to post any questions, comments, or suggestions you have about the book in the liveBook discussion forum.
translation_samples.target_text: 请务必将您对本书的任何问题、评论或建议发布在liveBook讨论论坛中。

translation_samples.source_text: Thank you for purchasing the MEAP for Build a Multi-Agent System (From Scratch).
translation_samples.target_text: 感谢您购买《构建多智能体系统（从零开始）》的MEAP版本。

translation_samples.source_text: This book, however, employs a hands-on approach to help you gain a deeper understanding of the inner workings of a multi-agent system and the LLM agents that comprise them by having you build these from scratch.
translation_samples.target_text: 然而，本书采用实践方法，通过让你从头构建多智能体系统及其组成的LLM智能体，帮助你更深入地理解其内部运作机制。
